title: Automated Trading Workflow
desc: A daily workflow running on Claude and MCP integrations that automates the research half of a swing-trading side hustle: scans, structured analysis, and trade-ready summaries before the open.

card.blurb: A daily workflow running on Claude and MCP integrations that automates the research half of a swing-trading side hustle: scans, structured analysis, and trade-ready summaries before the open.

title: Trading Command Sheet
desc: A personal command sheet for market analysis workflows: structured research, trade planning parameters, and repeatable analysis playbooks. Where the software engineering discipline meets the markets obsession.

card.blurb: A personal command sheet for market analysis workflows: structured research, trade planning parameters, repeatable playbooks.

title: Athena Cloud Migration
desc: Software engineering internship on the Athena platform: workload migration, data analytics, and tool development. Built a monitoring and visualisation tool now used globally by multiple lines of business to spot workload optimisation opportunities. Largely classified.
private: The interesting parts of this one are JPMC-internal, so the case study stays high-level here. Happy to go deeper in an interview.

card.blurb: Workload migration, analytics and tooling at JPMC. Built a monitoring tool now used globally across lines of business.

title: FRATS · Facial Recognition Attendance
desc: Facial Recognition Attendance Taking System, an NP capstone built for AIDC, a biometrics security company based in Indonesia. Python and its CV libraries end to end, supervised and mentored by an AIDC technical manager.

card.title: FRATS · capstone × AIDC
card.blurb: Facial Recognition Attendance Taking System for AIDC, an Indonesian biometrics security firm. Python and CV libraries, end to end.

title: Panel Party
desc: A fun, interactive tile-capture game built by my team for NP ICT Open House 2023: capture as many tiles as possible by moving over them before the timer runs out, without letting opponents re-capture them. I built sprite movement and collision detection.

card.blurb: Tile-capture arcade game built for NP ICT Open House 2023. I built sprite movement and collision detection.

title: AI Chatbot for Guards
desc: An army chatbot interface for Guards combatants, built as part of the Guards HQ AI Task Force. In progress and largely classified.
private: Largely classified. Happy to speak to scope and approach in person.

mini.blurb: army chatbot interface for combatants, SAF AI Task Force (in progress, largely classified)

title: Shipee App Prototype
desc: A mockup mobile and smartwatch prototype for Shipee, a personal rebrand of Aftership: user research, business analysis and market research through to hi-fi Figma screens with MapBox.

mini.blurb: shipment-tracking concept from user research to hi-fi prototype

title: Online Courier System
desc: Full courier management platform (NinjaVan-style) in ASP.NET Core MVC: customer and staff roles, auth, and database-backed workflows. Pushed personal capabilities in C#, JavaScript, and databases.

mini.blurb: full ASP.NET Core MVC courier platform with customer and staff roles

title: The Tea Shop
desc: A mock online tea business built with friends over a holiday: my first website from scratch, learning Bootstrap, plus product renders.

mini.blurb: mock online tea business, first website built from scratch

title: Tower Defence Game
desc: A text-based unit-defence game in the spirit of Plants vs Zombies, built in Python: game design, logic, and PyGame experience.

mini.blurb: text-based Python defence game; game design and logic

title: C3
desc: A mock start-up pitched for an entrepreneurship competition: a product suite around code collaboration and AI. Received the highest grade band for the proposal.

mini.blurb: mock start-up pitch around code collaboration and AI; highest grade band

title: locationX
desc: SST capstone: a scheduling app built for the National School Games (NSG).

mini.blurb: SST capstone: scheduling app built for the National School Games (NSG)

title: Sorts (iOS)
desc: iOS app helping educators group students by strength levels and group-size constraints, built because grouping by hand took too long. Lead programmer on team Pollo, the first real product, shipped at 14.

mini.blurb: student-grouping app for educators; lead programmer, shipped at fourteen
